title: Osila® | 2 Pack Solid 20cm Polystyrene Balls – White Craft Foam Spheres for Modelling, DIY Projects, School Crafts & Christmas Decorations
features: 🎨 Pack of 2 Solid Polystyrene Balls 20cm each – Durable, lightweight, and perfect for a wide range of craft and hobby projects.
🌟 Smooth, Paintable Surface – Easy to decorate with acrylics, glitter, pins, or glue for professional-looking results.
🎄 Ideal for Seasonal Crafts – Perfect for Christmas baubles, wreaths, snowmen, Easter eggs, and creative displays.
🏫 Great for School & DIY Projects – Excellent for educational models, science experiments, and home decorations.
♻️ Reusable & Versatile – High-quality solid polystyrene that can be reshaped, repainted, and used multiple times.
description: Unleash your creativity with this 2-pack of solid 20cm white polystyrene balls, perfect for crafts, modelling, DIY décor, and seasonal projects. Each ball is lightweight yet sturdy, providing the ideal base for painting, gluing, pinning, or covering with fabric, glitter, or sequins. Whether you’re making Christmas ornaments, school models, floral arrangements, or wreaths, these smooth-finish foam balls are easy to decorate and hold their shape perfectly. Great for adults and children alike — a must-have addition to any craft kit!
